chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-21of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on Office Objections at "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 09.03.2022 Mr. Mazhar Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General Sindh. ------ The petitioner has sought for his appointment in civil service on deceased quota basis. The policy to make appointment of family members of late employees in civil service was introduced in year 2002. The father of the petitioner admittedly has died in year 1992; it was much before introduction of such policy; therefore, the petitioner could not claim his appointment in civil service on the basis of deceased quota. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. J JUDGE
